headline: A Look At Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL) Valuation After Strong Multi Year Shareholder Returns
summary: Recent performance context for Royal Caribbean Cruises Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL) is drawing investor attention after the stock’s total return over the past 3 years reached about 2.32x, alongside a trailing 1 year total return of roughly 10%. headline: Loop Capital Initiates Coverage On Royal Caribbean Group with Hold Rating, Announces Price Target of $304
summary: Loop Capital  analyst Brandon Rolle   initiates coverage on Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE:RCL) with a Hold rating and announces Price Target of $304.
